services-airport-transfer.heading: Luxury Car Rental at Dubai Airport: Rolls-Royce Transfers with Chauffeur
services-airport-transfer.quickAnswer: Rolls-Royce Dubai offers chauffeur-driven DXB and DWC airport transfers with meet & greet, from AED 3,800/day (hourly from AED 800), plus free delivery across Dubai.
keyFacts: Covers both Dubai International (DXB) and Al Maktoum (DWC), with meet & greet and chauffeur included.
Fleet from Ghost (AED 3,800/day) up to Phantom (AED 5,800) and Cullinan 7-seater (AED 6,500); hourly from AED 800 (2-hour minimum).
Free delivery across Dubai including Downtown, Marina, Palm Jumeirah, JBR, Business Bay and DIFC.
Book 24/7 via WhatsApp +971 55 816 4922; service available in English, Arabic and Russian.
body: Land in style with our luxury car rental at Dubai airport, covering both DXB and DWC. Your professional chauffeur greets you on arrival with a personal meet & greet, handles your luggage, and drives you to Downtown Dubai, the Marina, or Palm Jumeirah in complete comfort. We track your flight, so delays never cost you a smooth pickup.

Choose a Ghost from AED 3,800/day or a Cullinan from AED 6,500/day, with free delivery across Dubai and 24/7 WhatsApp booking. Whether it is a business arrival, a family holiday, or a hotel transfer, our multilingual team makes your luxury car rental at Dubai airport effortless from the moment you touch down.

faqs.question: How much is a luxury car rental from Dubai airport?
faqs.answer: A chauffeured Rolls-Royce airport transfer starts from AED 3,800/day for the Ghost; the Phantom is AED 5,800, Cullinan AED 6,500, Dawn AED 5,500, Wraith AED 5,000 and Spectre AED 7,500. One-way DXB transfers are quoted on request — WhatsApp +971 55 816 4922 with your route.

faqs.question: Does the Rolls-Royce airport transfer in Dubai come with a driver?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Dubai airport transfer includes a professional English-speaking chauffeur. He meets you at arrivals with a name sign, helps with luggage and drives you to your hotel or destination.

faqs.question: Do you offer meet and greet at DXB and DWC airports?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide VIP meet & greet at Dubai International (DXB) and Al Maktoum (DWC) airports, plus Abu Dhabi (AUH) and Sharjah (SHJ). We track your flight and adjust pickup time automatically, with complimentary waiting included.

faqs.question: How long does the transfer from Dubai airport to my hotel take?
faqs.answer: From DXB it is roughly 15–20 minutes to Downtown Dubai, 25–35 minutes to Palm Jumeirah or Dubai Marina, and about 75–90 minutes to Abu Dhabi, depending on traffic. Your chauffeur plans the fastest route.

faqs.question: How do I book a luxury car pickup from Dubai airport?
faqs.answer: Send your flight number, terminal, date and destination via WhatsApp to +971 55 816 4922 or book online. Confirmation includes your chauffeur's details and meet-point at arrivals.
